g.text: CNT fibers now exceed copper by specific electrical conductivity

text.style: font-size: 5.5px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #475569

g.text: Source: processed CNT review seed database. Specific conductivity calculated as sigma/rho from canonical S/m and kg/m3 fields. Seed records are not fully deduplicated; use as a curation check, not a final meta-analysis.
